description: Account in Arabic script. Maybe an official/state document. Dating: No earlier than 1425 CE, based on the use of the currency ashrafī which was first minted under Sultan al-Ashraf Barsbay in this year. Pinholes in the margin (like the other folios in ENA 3922), and traces of glue and/or leather.
description_he: חשבון בכתב ערבי; אולי מסמך רשמי/ממלכתי; לא לפני 1425 לספירה (מטבע אשרפי); חורי סיכות בשוליים ועקבות דבק/עור
